name: Homemade White Bread from Bread Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to the temperature specified on the bread mix package.
2. In a large bowl, combine the yeast and lukewarm water. Let sit for about 10 minutes, or until the mixture becomes frothy.
3. Add the vegetable oil, bread mix, and beaten egg to the yeast mixture. Mix until well combined.
4. If using any of the optional variations (e.g., onion soup mix, brown sugar, wheat germ), add them at this stage.
5. Pour the dough into a greased baking pan and shape as desired.
6. Place the pan in the preheated oven and bake according to package instructions until golden brown and crusty.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing and serving.
